programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E93 - Dunny'. Mum bans the girls from saying the word 'dunny' because it's not a word the Queen of England would use, but the kids try and trick her into saying it anyway.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E100 - Typewriter'. Bluey, Snickers, and Winton are on their way to ask Calypso for help with their problems, when they are ambushed by the Terriers and use their unique talents to get past.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E98 - Baby Race'. Mum reminisces about Bluey and Judo as babies. Bluey learnt to roll over first, but Judo was the first to crawl, so then it became a race to see who was going to walk first.

programme.title: Dog Squad
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Mission: New Sound'. Diesel hears a new sound while helping his owner Rayane with the Sunday chores. What could it be?

programme.title: Ranger Hamza's Eco Quest
programme.desc: 'S2/E2'. Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers go on an eco quest to find out all about stinging nettles.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E21 - Blue Mountains'. Bluey, Bingo, Mum and Dad play a game of hand puppets, exploring the land beyond the Blue Mountains where they outsmart the Cheeky Fox to find the softest ever beds.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E22 - The Pool'. Packing for the pool, Bluey and Dad tease Mum about being so fussy with what to take. But when they arrive underprepared, they realise a little planning goes a long way.

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: 'S8/E19 - Sandy and Seaweed's Scarecrow Challenge'. It is harvest day on Captain Captain's vegetable patch and Sandy and Seaweed are helping dig up her carrots.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Bike'. Bluey is struggling to learn how to ride her bike. But as she and Dad watch her friends determination with their own tasks, Bluey is inspired to give it another try.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E48 - Teasing'. Bluey, Bingo and Mum get into a debate with Dad about the definition of teasing. As they recall all the times where he's been a Big Teaser, Dad argues that he was only just playing.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E49 - Asparagus'. Dad tells Bluey to mind her manners at the table - they're not animals. But when Bluey gets her hands on a stick of magic asparagus, she shows them everyone's got a wild side.

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: 'S7/E11'. Sandy and Seaweed are enjoying singing the Swashbuckle song but Captain Captain isn't very happy and suggests they write something themselves, with disastrous results.

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: 'S7/E12'. Captain Captain, Sandy and Seaweed get a new 'Smart Parrot' to help make life easier around the Scarlet Squid. Unfortunately it only ends up making life harder for the pirates!

programme.title: Topsy And Tim
programme.desc: 'S1/E69 - Lovely Mossy'. After school, Tim goes to the vet's with Dad. Grandma has been waiting there all day, as her lovely dog, Mossy, is very unwell.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E37 - Mr Monkeyjocks'. Dad thinks the kids have too many toys and suggests a chuck out. To save their beloved Mr Monkeyjocks from getting the chop, Bluey and Bingo must prove he is special.

programme.desc: 'S1/E19'. Lemon performs a stand-up routine!

programme.desc: 'S2/E10 - Postman Pat and Meera's Gecko'. Meera's expecting a her new pet Gecko, George, to arrive. Pat's collected him and is on his way - but the gecko has escaped and now everyone's looking all over Greendale for it!

programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Mission: Party Time'. Disability assistance dog Tinks is determined to help her owner Charli feel confident enough to go to a party.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran
programme.desc: 'S2/E29'. JoJo learns what nocturnal animals are and Gran Gran has a plan - to leave out a footprint tracker overnight to find out which night-time animals visit them while they're asleep!

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran
programme.desc: 'S2/E30'. When Mummy's at work, JoJo asks what a job is. While Gran Gran explains, they realise Mummy accidentally took Gran Gran's phone! Now JoJo's job is visiting Mummy to fix the mix-up!

programme.desc: 'S2/E15 - Postman Pat and the Karaoke Night'. The children of Greendale have been practicing for 'Karaoke Night' and cannot wait for it to be time to sing.

programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - Spy Game'. When Bingo stops playing Bluey's spy game, their grown-up controlling device stops working properly! Bluey now sees how important Bingo is and needs to win her back!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Takeaway'. Forced to wait five minutes in front of a restaurant for their takeaway, Bluey and Bingo become restless for entertainment, pushing the very limits of Dad's patience.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Butterflies'. Playing 'Butterflies' in the backyard is great fun, until Bluey runs away with Judo leaving Bingo all alone. Now poor Bingo's heartbroken and Bluey needs to make amends.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Yoga Ball'. Bingo loves playing with Dad, but sometimes he forgets Bingo is smaller than her sister. Mum teaches Bingo how to use her big girl bark to keep the fun within her limits.

programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - The Blocks vs Blocks Games'. The Alphablocks and the Numberblocks go head to head for the first ever Blocks vs Blocks obstacle relay race.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - Episode 20'. A toy dinosaur rampages in the Supermarket and scares the Grape Kids. Carrot and Supertato work out that it's controlled by a remote control and get the dinosaur back in its box.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E39 - The Sleepover'. A sleepover with their cousin means Bluey and Bingo get to stay up late! But when Muffin shows up exhausted after missing her nap, the girls get more fun than they bargained for.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E40 - Early Baby'. Bluey's playgroup is at odds when Indy's baby hospital collides with Rusty's knights and dragons. But in explaining themselves, they both find that their games actually have a lot in common.

programme.desc: 'S1/E42 - Hide and Seek'. It's time for a family game of hide and seek. Everyone hides, while Bluey counts to twenty, but will she be able to stay focused on the game and not get distracted by all her toys.

programme.title: The Vikings
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - The Vikings: The Ships of the Vikings'. The Vikings were great explorers and sailors. They exceeded all others in that area. Speedy, lightweight ships carried Nordic warriors all the way from their Scandinavia.

programme.title: Scanning the Nile
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Materials Convoys: A Pharaonic Task'. Discover the oldest Nilometer, which measured the river's water level. Scientists examine how the Nile was used to carry and transport construction stones downriver.

programme.title: Bastions of Power
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Life behind the Walls of Europe's Castles'. Part 1 of our documentary follows their development from simple wooden fortifications to the most elaborate strongholds and residences.

programme.title: Besieged Fortresses, Battles of Legend
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Acre: Clash of the Titans'. Philip Augustus and Richard the Lionheart join forces to fight on 'the crusade of kings' and free Saint-John of Acre from the Muslim conquest.

programme.title: St. Martin: The Real Martin of Tours
programme.desc: Every November 11th, the lanterns remind European children of St. Martin and the legend surrounding his sharing of his cloak. Who is the man behind the legend?

programme.title: The Vikings
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - The Vikings: Early Viking Society and Religion'. In this episode, we learn how early Viking society developed, what the sacred rituals really were, and what role women played in Viking religion.

programme.title: Inside The Mind Of A Serial Killer
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Eddie Leonski'. Private Eddie Leonski cut a perplexing figure. Three women were dead and detectives were sure there would be more victims.

programme.title: Inside The Mind Of A Serial Killer
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Angus Sinclair'. At just 16, Angus Robertson Sinclair was already on probation for one sex attack on a child when he came across 7-year-old Catherine Reehill.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ancient Murder Mysteries
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Tollund Man'. Homicide detective Rod Demery and forensic scientist Turi King investigate an Early Iron Age victim so well-preserved that he seems to be peacefully sleeping.

programme.title: Forensics: The Science of Crime
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Bug Detectives'. This documentary takes two cases, to demonstrate how the entomologist Jens Amendt and the forensic soil expert Lorna Dawson work.

programme.title: Inside The Mind Of A Serial Killer
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Anders Breivik'. What transformed Anders Breivik, a privileged Norwegian with a bright career ahead of him, into a racist right-winger intent on killing as many people as he could?

programme.title: Inside The Mind Of A Serial Killer
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Surinder Koli'. Children go missing from a small community in New Delhi. Are they being taken by 'country boy', Surinder Koli whose mind has been warped by sex parties thrown by his boss?

programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - INTERSTATE How The Interstate Connected and Divided America'. Dwight Eisenhower's interstate highway system was the biggest infrastructure project of its time, a bold plan to connect all corners of America.

programme.title: News
programme.desc: The leading news stories of the moment.

programme.title: Greek Island Odyssey with Bettany H...
programme.desc: 'Greek Island Odyssey with Bettany Hughes. S1/E4 - Crete: Chania, Knossos and Eleutherna'. Arriving just as a sea storm hits, Bettany is lucky to reach Crete. She travels to the ruins of the ancient city of Knossos.

programme.title: Treasures with Bettany Hughes
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Oman'. Bettany uncovers a society which grew rich by selling copper, and visits the crowning glory of Bronze Age Oman.

programme.title: Wonders of the Moon with Dara Ó Briain
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Dara tells the story of how the first photograph of the far side of the moon left scientists baffled. And he tries a virtual reality headset to takes his very own giant leap on the 'moon's' surface.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: Return To The Wild
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Georgia'. Ben Fogle reunites with a man living in the swamplands of Georgia, who has experienced a life-changing accident in the six years since they first met.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Out in the Cold'. Kim and Pierre's trapping season is complicated by a troublesome local resident.

programme.title: Ancient Egypt By Train
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Alice arrives in Cairo by train with a book she first read as a youth: A Thousand Miles Up the Nile by Victorian Egyptologist Amelia Edwards. Alice follows Edwards' footsteps to the Great Pyramids.

programme.title: Greek Island Odyssey with Bettany H...
programme.desc: 'Greek Island Odyssey with Bettany Hughes. S1/E4 - Crete: Chania, Knossos and Eleutherna'. Arriving just as a sea storm hits, Bettany is lucky to reach Crete. She travels to the ruins of the ancient city of Knossos.

programme.title: Treasures with Bettany Hughes
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Oman'. Bettany uncovers a society which grew rich by selling copper, and visits the crowning glory of Bronze Age Oman.

programme.title: Ancient Egypt By Train
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Starting in Alexandria, Alice searches for Cleopatra, discovers how the Romans and the Greeks reacted to the treasures of Ancient Egypt, and learns how a slave became a sultan and built his own caste

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S10/E10 - Snared'. Lessons are learned and personal battles are fought by Alaskans enduring winter's descent. Chip and Agnes hailstone dig their boat out of the ice and Ricko Dewilde takes his two daughters on a hunt.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S9/E9 - Uruguay'. Ben Fogle meets Rhona Mitra who has swapped her home in Hollywood for a remote farmhouse in Uruguay.

programme.title: Greek Island Odyssey with Bettany H...
programme.desc: 'Greek Island Odyssey with Bettany Hughes. S1/E4 - Crete: Chania, Knossos and Eleutherna'. Arriving just as a sea storm hits, Bettany is lucky to reach Crete. She travels to the ruins of the ancient city of Knossos.

programme.title: Treasures with Bettany Hughes
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Oman'. Bettany uncovers a society which grew rich by selling copper, and visits the crowning glory of Bronze Age Oman.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: Return To The Wild
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Georgia'. Ben Fogle reunites with a man living in the swamplands of Georgia, who has experienced a life-changing accident in the six years since they first met.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Out in the Cold'. Kim and Pierre's trapping season is complicated by a troublesome local resident.

programme.title: The World's Deadliest Weather
programme.desc: 'S3/E13'. A volcano eruption in Hawaii destroys a neighbourhood, and good Samaritans rescue residents trapped in Hurricane Harvey's deadly flood waters.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S10/E1 - Australia'. Ben heads to Australia where he meets Bette, who lives alone in a ramshackle property in northern Queensland. Fogle quickly becomes acquainted with her no-nonsense attitude.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S10/E11 - Forbidden Lands'. The end of winter has arrived, and Alaskans venture out in search of survival necessities.

programme.title: Treasures with Bettany Hughes
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Oman'. Bettany uncovers a society which grew rich by selling copper, and visits the crowning glory of Bronze Age Oman.

programme.title: Exploring India with Bettany Hughes
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - The South'. Bettany enjoys the breath-taking journey through the Tamil Nadu hills, between Mettupalayam and Udhagamandalam (Ooty).

programme.title: Africa
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Congo'. In the Congo, ingenious chimpanzees steal honey from hard-working sweat bees by engineering a large stick to smash open the nest.

programme.title: Greek Island Odyssey with Bettany H...
programme.desc: 'Greek Island Odyssey with Bettany Hughes. S1/E5 - The Peloponnese: Sparta, Mycenae and Pylos'. Bettany arrives in the Peloponnese, home to some of ancient Greece's most legendary kings and vicious warriors.

programme.title: Ancient Egypt By Train
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Alice arrives in Cairo by train with a book she first read as a youth: A Thousand Miles Up the Nile by Victorian Egyptologist Amelia Edwards. Alice follows Edwards' footsteps to the Great Pyramids.

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of the Pacific
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Philippines'. Martin explores the Philippines, from Manila's jeepneys to remote tribal burials.

programme.title: Hidden Frontiers: Arabia...
programme.desc: 'Hidden Frontiers: Arabia with Reza Pakravan. S1/E1'. Reza explores the possibility of human habitation in an impenetrable canyon system in Oman.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: Return To The Wild
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Australia'. Ben reunites with a couple living off the coast of Australia, and discovers the logistical nightmares they overcome to make a home for themselves on a desert island.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Feast or Famine'. Pike Mike tries to improvise a new source of bush power.

programme.title: Ancient Egypt By Train
programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. Alice takes the train to Luxor to see Tutankhamun's tomb and his mummified body in the Valley of the Kings. She also takes a walk along the Avenue of the Sphinxes.

programme.title: Greek Island Odyssey with Bettany H...
programme.desc: 'Greek Island Odyssey with Bettany Hughes. S1/E5 - The Peloponnese: Sparta, Mycenae and Pylos'. Bettany arrives in the Peloponnese, home to some of ancient Greece's most legendary kings and vicious warriors.

programme.title: Big Sky Kitchen With Eduardo Garcia
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - Cowboy Breakfast'. Before horseback riding, Eduardo Garcia campfire coal-roasts a hearty breakfast of beet & sweet potato hash, square bale biscuits, and hollandaise.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S7/E19 - Tuscany'. Andrew Zimmern explores the delicious traditional Tuscan cuisine. He tries many specialities like spicy fish stew served with crusty bread and chickpea pancakes.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S7/E20 - Genoa'. Andrew Zimmern is in Genoa, Italy. The stunning city offers an incredible variety of traditional cuisine - Pesto pasta, seafood salad and decadent flatbread.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S56/E3 - Halloween Spooktacular'. For Halloween, the chefs find spooky ingredients in their baskets. They struggle with a 'pasta brain' and take their final shot with tasty syringes.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods With Andrew Zimmern
programme.desc: 'S8/E3 - Okinawa'. Andrew Zimmern travels across the globe to try the world's most exotic foods. He visits markets and restaurants to sample incredible and unique cuisines.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: 'S18/E13 - Delusions Of Grandeur'. Brothers Yaser and Nader are on the verge of losing their French bistro, Gaston's. Robert must convince these delusional owners to transform their business.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S35/E8 - Food Network Super Chefs'. Guy Fieri hits up joints owned by Food Network super chefs, like Maneet Chauhan, who is serving up her creative spin on Indian recipes in Nashville.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S55/E7 - FAN-atics'. Four lucky superfans get the chance of a lifetime to compete in the kitchen! They take on a giant gummy creature and an intimidating piece of protein.

programme.title: Beachside Brawl
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - Summer Around The World'. With the ultimate summer getaway worth $25,000 on the line, Antonia Lofaso challenges the finalists to serve their best shack snack and signature dinner.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay Vs Burrell Vs Tila
programme.desc: 'S3/E4 - Throwback BBQ'. A true BBQ master must know their history. The competitors must dig deep to pass the ultimate old-school BBQ test under the watchful eyes of their captains.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: 'S21/E13 - Summer Party Helpline'. The gang shares tips and recipes for throwing an easy summer party. Alejandra Ramos and Fanny Slater make slow cooker pineapple habanero chicken sandwiches.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S56/E4 - Mouth Of The South'. Four chefs from the South aim to up their games against talented peers. First up, the appetiser basket includes a questionable take on fried chicken.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay Vs Burrell Vs Tila
programme.desc: 'S3/E1 - 'Cue The Introductions'. Nine BBQ masters introduce themselves and their 'cue in hopes of being picked by their favorite team captain - Bobby Flay, Anne Burrell or Jet Tila.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay Vs Burrell Vs Tila
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - BBQ Games'. After a big team shake-up, the pitmasters could use a day of BBQ games with their new captains. Bobby Flay, Anne Burrell and Jet Tila lead their new teams!

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay Vs Burrell Vs Tila
programme.desc: 'S3/E3 - Backyard BBQ'. Every BBQ master gets their start in the backyard! The competitors showcase their skills in the kinds of sticky situations that home grillers must master.

programme.title: Paul Hollywood - City Bakes
programme.desc: 'S2/E10 - Cape Town'. Paul Hollywood gets a tour around Cape Town by Siba Mtongana. Plus, he bakes two Afrikaans classic with a British twist - Earl Grey milk tart and BBQ meat pasties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins And Dives: Triple...
programme.desc: 'Diners, Drive-Ins And Dives: Triple D Nation. S5/E7 - Wraps And Rolls'. Guy Fieri has an East Coast experience in Florida and North Carolina at a pastrami food truck, a hot dog haven and an O.G. Triple D alum.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S46/E1 - Here To Persevere!'. Host Ted Allen challenges four chefs to make an appetiser using cocktail fruit slices, canned clam sauce and sausage-stuffed pancakes on sticks.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S50/E3 - Time Capsule: Future Foods!'. The competing chefs cook with futuristic ingredients. They include insects, an innovative milk product and what could be the next big grain!

programme.title: Ciao House
programme.desc: 'S2/E9 - Meow House'. The final four chefs are shocked when the judges challenge them to create a three-course menu using only five ingredients per dish.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: 'S19/E1 - Extreme British Makeover'. British ex-pat, Lee is on the brink of losing his restaurant, From Across the Pond, in Colleyville, TX. Robert Irvine helps him turn it around.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S35/E9 - Plating Up Puerto Rico'. Guy Fieri travels with Antonia Lofaso on a culinary journey through Puerto Rico. In Old San Juan, they dig into a chicken-trifongo combo.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S55/E19 - Oh My Squash!'. The four competitors ramp up the creativity with a peanut butter appetizer, grilled entrées with some sweet sauces and a squash dessert.

programme.title: Next Baking Master: Paris
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Like A Fine Wine And Cheese'. The final four shop for a dessert spotlighting cheese. Next, after a lesson from a sommelier, the competitors create desserts featuring alcohol.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S9/E2 - Do-nut Ride This Carousel'. The bakers make bloody filled doughnuts to commemorate an unfortunate accident and mix joy with doom on the creepiest carousel ever.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen
programme.desc: 'S6/E6 - Land And Sea'. Guy Fieri travels the surf and turf with tasty bites and seafood cocktails! There's a Da Nang cocktail, crispy catfish raft and bacon-wrapped shrimp.

programme.title: Kid Chef Nation
programme.desc: 'S1/E99 - Kids Grilling Invitational'. Seven top kid chefs in the US travel to Orange Beach, Alabama, to compete in the first-ever World Food Championships Kids Grilling Invitational.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay Vs Burrell Vs Tila
programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - You Gotta Beef With Me?!'. In an all-beef challenge, the teams are tasked with making a variety of beef-focused dishes that test their expertise with both small and large cuts.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S29/E8 - Regional Recipes'. Guy Fieri is diving into dishes with regional flavour. In California, a real-deal Mexican eatery is serving up Michoacán specialities, like blazing hot molcajete.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S29/E9 - Cultural Twist'. Guy Fieri dives into cultural cuisine with a twist! First, he visits a cafe that has been serving Scandinavian specialties in Salt Lake City since the 1950s.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout
programme.desc: 'S6/E1 - Judges Takeover Heat No. 1'. Chefs Eric Greenspan, Antonia Lofaso and Aarti Sequeira step away from the judges' table to cook their way to a spot in the tournament finale.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: 'S20/E3 - Marriage On The Rocks'. In Stone Mountain, GA, Robert Irvine visits the failing Sweet Potato Café. The business is destroying its owners' finances and their 25-year marriage.

programme.title: Ranch To Table
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Welcome To The Ranch'. Elizabeth Poett tours her family's 14,000-acre ranch in California. She tends to the land at dawn then prepares a Santa Maria Style Tri-Tip for dinner.

programme.title: Asphalt Cowboys
programme.desc: 'S5/E6 - Forever!'. The big day has finally arrived: trucker Mike and his girlfriend Bianca are getting married. Meanwhile, Thorsten has to deal with a broken down truck.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Demolition Theatre
programme.desc: 'S3/E3 - Vehicular Mayhem Medley'. Richard Rawlings takes a look at more crazy viral footage. A woman drives her car off the top of a parking garage and a criminal flees from a cop car.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: 'S4/E5 - The Supernova'. 16 years in the making, Kindig It Design finally finishes the '67 Nova. With a fairly standard exterior, will its over 2,000HP be powerful enough for the client?

programme.title: Fish Or Die
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Tacos & Tarpon'. In Mexico, the crew navigate a maze of crocodile and mosquito-infested waterways and lagoons in search of a rumoured paradise for fishing tarpon.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: 'S4/E8 - Secrets Of The Range Rider'. The end of summer leaves little time to complete winter preparations. To heat the cabin, the family must transform raw metal pipes into a working chimney.

programme.title: America: Facts Vs Fiction
programme.desc: 'S3/E8 - Not So Close Encounters'. Did an alien spaceship crash in Roswell in 1947, and are scientists reverse-engineering extra-terrestrial technology in the Nevada desert's Area 51?

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: 'S9/E9 - Bumpers/Lighting Gels/Camera Filters/Steam-Powered Models'. How are lighting gels, bumpers, camera filters and steam-powered models made? Find out, as more everyday items are put under the microscope.

programme.title: Street Outlaws
programme.desc: 'S5/E4 - Top Dom'. The racers of the 405 struggle to get their cars ready after a tough few weeks of list racing. Meanwhile, Farmtruck and AZN head out of town for an Enduro Race.

programme.title: Ultimate Ninja Challenge
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - The Darkest Hour'. Captured, bound, and blindfolded in the dark of night, the warriors must escape the frigid Canadian wilderness before sunrise. Plus, one survivalist goes rogue.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: 'S9/E10 - Umbrellas/Outboard Motors/Silver Cutlery/Tape Measures'. How do they make umbrellas, outboard motors, silver cutlery, and tape measures? Find out, as more everyday items are put under the microscope.

programme.title: Street Outlaws
programme.desc: 'S5/E4 - Top Dom'. The racers of the 405 struggle to get their cars ready after a tough few weeks of list racing. Meanwhile, Farmtruck and AZN head out of town for an Enduro Race.

programme.title: Ultimate Ninja Challenge
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - The Darkest Hour'. Captured, bound, and blindfolded in the dark of night, the warriors must escape the frigid Canadian wilderness before sunrise. Plus, one survivalist goes rogue.

programme.title: What Could Possibly Go Wrong?
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Concrete Canoe Challenge'. Kevin and Grant turn science into speed and turbocharge a Rocket Skateboard. Using a batch of homemade supersonic rocket fuel, what could possibly go wrong?

programme.title: Ultimate Car Build-Off
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Flight Of The Firebird'. ES Motorsports and Hollywood Hot Rods compete to reach the final. Which team can turn their Firebird into a flying car, going the furthest when taking off from a 60-metre cliff?

programme.title: Street Outlaws
programme.desc: 'S5/E4 - Top Dom'. The racers of the 405 struggle to get their cars ready after a tough few weeks of list racing. Meanwhile, Farmtruck and AZN head out of town for an Enduro Race.

programme.title: Ultimate Ninja Challenge
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Eyes On The Prize'. Isolated and alone, each survivalist endures a gruelling overnight solo mission. Survivors of the final challenge travel to Japan for a lesson from a Ninja master.

programme.title: What Could Possibly Go Wrong?
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Concrete Canoe Challenge'. Kevin and Grant turn science into speed and turbocharge a Rocket Skateboard. Using a batch of homemade supersonic rocket fuel, what could possibly go wrong?

programme.title: Fish Or Die
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Tacos & Tarpon'. In Mexico, the crew navigate a maze of crocodile and mosquito-infested waterways and lagoons in search of a rumoured paradise for fishing tarpon.

programme.title: Roadworthy Rescues
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Rebel With A Cause'. Derek travels to the last standing AMC dealership in Pikeville, North Carolina. He finds an AMC Rebel SST convertible that needs reviving.

programme.title: Asphalt Cowboys
programme.desc: 'S5/E6 - Forever!'. The big day has finally arrived: trucker Mike and his girlfriend Bianca are getting married. Meanwhile, Thorsten has to deal with a broken down truck.

programme.title: Street Outlaws
programme.desc: 'S5/E5 - Asphalt Eruption'. The top three prep their cars for race night, and Farmtruck and AZN line up against Murder Nova's dad. On race night, tensions flare between Chuck and Shane.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Demolition Theatre
programme.desc: 'S3/E4 - Flipping Out'. Richard Rawlings takes a look at more crazy viral footage. A man chases his car after forgetting the parking brake, and an inexperienced drag racer flips his car.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: 'S4/E6 - The One Where Nick Gets Arrested'. The guys go to Pleasanton, CA, for a big West Coast car show. But first, they must get a Chevelle road-ready - if the staff aren't arrested.

programme.title: Ultimate Car Build-Off
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Push Me, Pull You'. In Detroit, Team Z Motorsports and Alternative Automotive Technologies buy two front-wheel drive cars and make them into one car that can drive in both directions.

programme.title: World's Biggest Shipbuilders
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Huge Hulls'. The workers face one of the heaviest lifts any of them have ever attempted - hoisting a giant 3,000-tonne leg into position, with the help of the yard's floating crane.

programme.title: Ultimate Ninja Challenge
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Hell In High Water'. Rafting through frigid mountain rapids tests the competitors' ability to work together. A brutal injury could take one of them out of the challenge.

programme.title: What Could Possibly Go Wrong?
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Homemade Hovercraft Hijinks'. Kevin and Grant test their skills when building a homemade hovercraft capable of crossing land and sea. Plus, how can a merry-go-round produce G-forces?

programme.title: Fish Or Die
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Danger Down Under'. The Barramundi is nearly impossible to find in the wild. The crew travels to Australia, where Aboriginal guides take them to a Barra fisherman's paradise.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: 'S4/E9 - Claims, Cans And Cabins'. Otto, Eivin and August scramble to stake a claim on 10 tons of priceless steel on a distant beach. Meanwhile, Shane and Kelli break ground on their cabin.

programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - A Slippy Ice Cube'. Pat delivers a huge block of ice. It's a race against time to deliver it, especially when the ice flies out and lands in a field of sheep.

programme.desc: 'S3/E60 - The Rocket Boot/The Many Versions Of Larry'. Larry becomes obsessed with Ichabeezer's new rocket boot. Worried he's a cucumber with no style, Larry starts to imitate his flashier friends.

programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - The Case Of The Toyland Accidents'. Something strange is happening in Toyland - trees are falling down and machines are going crazy.

programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - The Case Of The Fable Forest Gold'. The Pirates are searching for the long-lost Fable Forest Gold. If they can't find it they might have to stop being pirates for good!

programme.desc: Beant Singh Virk is the proud father of Heer Virk, an all-rounder, good daughter and aspiring lawyer.

programme.title: Aparajita
programme.desc: 'S1/E65'. Akshay tells the police officers that he is an intelligence officer and threatens to call the home minister to complain against them if they do not release the girls.

programme.title: Cat Person
programme.desc: A horror that explores the fears of dating. When Margot goes on a date with the older Robert, she finds that he doesn't live up to the Robert she has been flirting with over texts.

programme.title: Perfectly Single
programme.desc: A conservative and socially awkward optometrist takes a leap of faith with a young suitor. Soon, her journey leads her down a path to self-discovery.

programme.title: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: Romcom queen Katherine Heigl and Gerard Butler star in this film. A lonely morning show producer is dragged into her chauvinistic correspondent's experiment to find love.

programme.title: Ms. Match
programme.desc: A romcom about love and dating. A single woman working for a dating company goes on dates under an alias and becomes so comfortable that she no longer knows how to date as herself.

programme.title: Kangaroo Jack
programme.desc: Anthony Anderson stars in this comedy. A rag-tag group get mixed up with the mob and a forced to deliver $50,000 to Australia, but they are not ready for a wild kangaroo.

programme.title: H Is For Happiness
programme.desc: A charming teen movie about love and family. An optimistic 12-year-old girl with a unique worldview is inspired by a strange new boy at school, and she sets out to mend her family.

programme.title: Escape From Planet Earth
programme.desc: In this animated adventure comedy starring Brendan Fraser, a national hero to a planet of blue aliens suddenly finds that he himself needs rescue.

programme.title: Camp Hideout
programme.desc: A troublesome crime comedy. After a teen steals an important item from two big-city goons, he hides in a church summer camp and must protect his newfound friends.

programme.title: Riki Rhino: The Bird Kingdom
programme.desc: A fun, family adventure. Riki, a brave rhino, and his duck friend Beni journey through a tropical jungle to find a magic seed that will help save their home from a foreseen tsunami.

programme.title: Wonder Park
programme.desc: Dreams come true in this magical animation. A girl, with a wild imagination, wakes up to find herself in her own Wonder Park, but the park needs her help to save it.

programme.title: Lyle, Lyle, Crocodile
programme.desc: Javier Bardem stars in this charming musical comedy based on a children's book series. A family moves into a new house, not realising that the house has a living, singing crocodile.

programme.title: The War With Grandpa
programme.desc: Robert De Niro might have met his match in this comedy. Upset that he has to share the room he loves with his grandpa, Peter decides to declare war in an attempt to get it back.

programme.title: Shotgun Wedding
programme.desc: When criminals hijack a lavish destination wedding, Jennifer Lopez and Josh Duhamel fight for their lives, families, and relationship in this action comedy.

programme.title: Asteroid City
programme.desc: A starry, quirky and striking sci-fi comedy by Wes Anderson. Junior Stargazers and their parents attend a space cadet convention, only to have their worldview disrupted forever.

programme.title: Fool's Paradise
programme.desc: Charlie Day writes, directs and leads this crazy and hilarious star-studded comedy. A fool for love becomes an accidental celebrity only to lose it all.

programme.title: Copshop
programme.desc: Gerard Butler leads a great ensemble cast in this action thriller. A wily con artist running from an assassin devises a scheme to hide inside a small-town police station.

programme.title: Land Of Bad
programme.desc: Luke and Liam Hemsworth, and Russell Crowe drive this action movie. A US Army special forces unit is ambushed during a mission- their only hope - a remote Air Force drone operator.

programme.title: The Calm Beyond
programme.desc: A tense survival thriller. After a typhoon devastates Hong Kong, a young woman conceals her existence in a ruined building until a small child floats into her life.

programme.title: A Dangerous Defense
programme.desc: A complex mystery thriller. A lawyer is tasked with representing her estranged sister, who's accused of murdering their father. Is she responsible, or is it someone else?

programme.title: The Troubles: A Dublin Story
programme.desc: A gritty and intense film based on true events of Ireland's history. Two brothers are naively drawn into the complex world of republicanism as they try to fund the northern war machine.

programme.title: A Million Days
programme.desc: A gripping sci-fi thriller. It's 2041, Earth is in ecological collapse, and humanity's survival rests on settling new worlds. But the mission's AI assistant has a secret agenda.

programme.title: Twisted Vines
programme.desc: A murder mystery that will keep you guessing. A wedding at a vineyard estate turns deadly when a body is discovered, and all the guests turn into suspects.

programme.title: A Glass Of Revenge
programme.desc: An aspiring sommelier enters a training program. When people in the program mysteriously turn up dead, she finds herself not only framed for their murders but also in mortal danger.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: Based on the TV drama. Samuel L. Jackson, Colin Farrell, and Michelle Rodriguez must deal with a deadly situation as a SWAT team tries to stop a locked-up crime boss from escaping.

programme.title: Wire Room
programme.desc: Bruce Willis and Kevin Dillon star in this thriller. While on wire room duty, a federal agent listens as a hit squad attacks the target. Can he protect him from fifty miles away.

programme.title: The Matrix Reloaded
programme.desc: Keanu Reeves, Laurence Fishburne and Carrie-Anne Moss continue their quest to free the world from the grip of the machines in the pulsating sequel to The Matrix.

programme.title: Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw
programme.desc: Dwayne Johnson and Jason Statham drive this epic spin-off to the Fast franchise. They team up to stop a fierce Idris Elba who plays a mercenary with a deadly virus.

programme.title: Madame Web
programme.desc: Dakota Johnson joins the world of superheroes. A paramedic gains the ability to see the future and uses her power to protect three girls stalked by a killer.

programme.title: Kandahar
programme.desc: Gerard Butler fights against the odds in this war movie. A CIA operative and his translator flee from special forces in Afghanistan after exposing a covert mission.

programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S1/E16 - Gamer'. Ruled out of a video game tournament because of Marinette, Max gets akumatized. Now the Gamer, he controls a robot that wreaks havoc.

programme.title: Hailey's on It!
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Flippin' Out/Smells Like Queen Spirit'. When Hailey joins the cheerleading squad, she quickly realizes she's underestimated what it takes. Hailey must defeat a chaos bot while competing in the Crab Queen Pageant.

programme.title: Hailey's on It!
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Kristine-ceanera/The Puffle Kerfuffle'. When Kristine's dad takes over her quinceañera, Kristine rebels. When Hailey tries to reunite a beloved singing duo, she becomes worried about her future with Scott.

programme.title: Jessie
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Star Wars'. Morgan asks A-list movie star teen heartthrob Jordan to stay with the Ross family so he can convince him to star in his next movie.

programme.title: Jessie
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - The Kid Whisperer'. Jessie's having trouble with Luke, and asks advice from fellow nanny Samantha. Her tips seem to work, then Jessie discovers Samantha's also a dog sitter!

programme.title: Bunk'd: Learning The Ropes
programme.desc: 'S7/E155 - Free Falls and Pickleball'. To impress her brother, Barb pretends Kikiwaka Ranch belongs to her, Noah helps Jake overcome his fear of heights, Parker and Destiny play in a pickleball tournament.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Learning The Ropes
programme.desc: 'S7/E156 - And the Kiki Goes To...'. When a recruiter from Juilliard visits camp, Noah enlists Destiny to help him prepare for an audition, Lou tries to prove to the campers that she is fun.

programme.title: Secrets Of Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Time After Time'. Harper is surprised to find Griffin at the hatch waiting for her. He says that he saw that she'd traveled back to the date her father died and asks if she tried to alter things.

programme.title: Secrets Of Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: 'S2/E12 - Only Time Will Tell'. After time travelling through the portal to 1930, Harper and Griffin unravel the mystery of who's been haunting the Tremont Hotel all along.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S1/E15 - Princess Fragrance'. A fellow student of Marinette's gets akumatized by Hawk Moth. Now Princess Fragrance, she wants to abduct a Prince visiting Paris.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S1/E13 - The Mime'. Betrayed by a partner, Fred Haprèle gets akumatized and turns into the Mime. Now, whatever he acts out comes to life and he's determined to express his rage.

programme.title: Descendants Wicked World
programme.desc: 'S2/E19 - Slumber Party'. While throwing a slumber party, the Aks and VKs realize that, despite their differences, they'd rather be friends with each other than anyone else.

programme.title: The Ghost and Molly McGee
programme.desc: 'S2/E23 - Faint of Art/A Soda to Remember'. When Sharon has 'artist's block,' Molly and the family take away all her distractions. When Scratch recalls a rare soda from his past life, Molly is determined to get it for him.

programme.title: The Ghost and Molly McGee
programme.desc: 'S2/E24 - A Period Piece/It's Always Sunny in Sunnyland'. When Libby gets her period before Molly does, Molly feels 'out of sync' with her best friend. When the McGee's vacation gets cancelled, Molly creates a staycation instead.

programme.title: Hailey's on It!
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - Seas the Day/Kissed Opportunities'. Hailey brings Scott to Catalina Island to raise his spirits and confess her feelings. Hailey throws a party and sees an opportunity to kiss Scott as part of a harmless game.

programme.title: Chip 'n' Dale: Park Life
programme.desc: 'S2/E29 - Hamster Paradise/Puppy Papas/The Adorables'. Chip and Dale toughen up a pair of domesticated hamsters. / Chip and Dale agree to look after Pluto's mischievous puppies.

programme.title: Chip 'n' Dale: Park Life
programme.desc: 'S2/E30 - Sleepless Symphony/The Bell/The Suitcase'. Chip and Dale must find a place to sleep after they are thrown out of their house in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S1/E5 - The Pharaoh'. Jalil, a young Egyptologist, is akumatized by Hawk Moth. He becomes Pharaoh and wants to sacrifice Alya in a ritual. Can Ladybug and Cat Noir stop him?

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S1/E6 - Mister Pigeon'. Mr. Ramier is a pigeon lover. Akumatized by Hawk Moth, he becomes Mr. Pigeon and wants to turn Paris into a kingdom for his favorite birds.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S1/E7 - Lady Wifi'. Marinette's best friend Alya is akumatized by Hawk Moth. Now Lady Wifi, she's convinced Chloé is Ladybug and seeks to unmask her.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S1/E8 - The Evillustrator'. A fellow student in love with Marinette gets akumatized by Hawk Moth. Now the Evillustrator, he seeks revenge against Chloé, the bully who made fun of him.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S2/E43 - Tilly Style/I, Farmbot'. Tilly searches the mall for a new look to reflect her maturity. Cricket persuades Bill to buy a farming robot in order to get out of chores.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S2/E44 - Friend Con/Flimflammed'. Chip Whistler and Bill hit it off and become friends at Farm Con. Cricket stumbles into having one hundred dollars and immediately buys into a pyramid scheme.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S2/E45 - Greens' Acres/Dolled Up'. Flashback: Young Bill will do whatever it takes to help keep the family farm in business. Tilly and Nancy enjoy Saxon's birthday at a fancy doll store.

programme.title: Zombies: The Re-animated Series
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Robot Space Bear'. A sci-fi robot-bear has Zed and Addison cornered, but their debate - fight it or talk to it? - raises a greater question: Should they call it Robot Space Bear, or Space Bear Robot?

programme.title: Bunk'd: Learning The Ropes
programme.desc: 'S7/E149 - Me, Myself, and A.I.'. Jake and Bill use an Artificial Intelligence program to pose as Lou and trick Noah, Parker discovers that Winnie is afraid to go to the dentist, so he helps her get over her fear.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Learning The Ropes
programme.desc: 'S7/E150 - The Glitching Hour'. Noah and Megan watch a strange VHS tape that leads them to believe Jake isn't really who he seems, Lou thinks her life is a television show, and Bill and Winnie are just actors.

programme.title: Zombies: The Re-animated Series
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Alien Vs. Shredator/A Wyatt Place'. Wynter and A-Spen start a band! But can they reconcile their differing musical visions? Willa and Bucky put Wyatt through an 'alpha-dog-boot camp' to help him win over Eliza.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - 1/15'. Cricket is excited for his first Halloween in Big City, where he and Tilly expect to collect way more candy than they ever got Trick-or-Treating in the country!

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: 'S3/E6 - Curse Of The Red Planet'. Three cosmonauts die mysteriously as they re-enter Earth's atmosphere. Plus, a NASA rover discovers clues that help solve a murder.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: 'S105/E10 - Singapore Swap'. A family are moving to one of the world's most expensive cities, Singapore. They struggle to find a home that suits all their needs and that sticks to their budget.

programme.title: Alaskan Killer Bigfoot
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Camp Terror'. Keith fears Portlock is cursed when he learns the horrifying history of the mysterious coin. Later, Ash regrets ignoring a warning not to venture into an abandoned mine.

programme.title: Alaskan Killer Bigfoot
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - We're The Prey'. The team is unnerved by evidence that Nantinaq may be lurking in the water, and things get out of control when they spot an inexplicable blaze in the woods.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot
programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - Fresh Kills'. Russell is unnerved by a gruesome discovery while the rest of the team searches for a top-secret research facility hidden beneath the forest.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot
programme.desc: 'S3/E6 - Return To Lake Fear'. The team uncovers a potential Bigfoot kill zone and launch a squadron of patrol drones to sweep the area for the existence of Sasquatch.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - The Moon That Disappeared'. Newly discovered documents reveal NASA's secret plan B for failure of the first moon landing. And NASA's Cassini mission unravels a 300-year-old mystery.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: 'S3/E6 - Curse Of The Red Planet'. Three cosmonauts die mysteriously as they re-enter Earth's atmosphere. Plus, a NASA rover discovers clues that help solve a murder.

programme.title: UFO Witness
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Alien High Tech'. A startling new report claims a prominent astrophysicist worked on an aircraft reverse-engineered from the parts of downed UFOs. Ben Hansen investigates.

programme.title: UFO Witness
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Aliens Underground'. The small town of Dulce, New Mexico, may harbour an underground alien base. Ben Hansen travels there to investigate if the rumours are true.

programme.title: Aliens In Alaska
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - They Walk Among Us'. Hunters unearth new clues about Bigfoot's cosmic origins. An Air Force veteran receives a shocking response when he reports UFO activity over Fairbanks.

programme.title: Aliens In Alaska
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Captured'. A couple finds massive footprints near Nancy Lake. Is something nonhuman stalking them? Strange lights circle above Fairbanks in coordinated patterns, shocking witnesses.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Underground
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - American Stonehenge'. Rob Nelson investigates the mysterious rocks at the bottom of Lake Michigan known as Underwater Stonehenge. Plus, the search for escape tunnels in Alcatraz.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Underground
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Mystery Of The Serpent Mound'. Rob Nelson investigates mysterious tunnels under Denver's airport. Plus, in Ohio he tries to uncover the secrets of a giant serpent-shaped mound.

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - The UFO Cover-Up'. Discover the truth behind the UFO cover up. Did a Nazi flying saucer crash in New Mexico? Are aliens living at Area 51? Or are these rumours to hide the real story?

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Outlaw Bikers'. Outlaw bikers are often secretive organisations. But are they international crime syndicates, or social clubs for outcasts and nonconformists? Discover the truth.

programme.title: In Search Of Monsters
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - The Yeti'. Experts investigate shocking new DNA evidence that links one of the world's most elusive figures, the Yeti, resides in America and comes from an otherworldly source.

programme.title: In Search Of Monsters
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - The Beast Of Bray Road'. Experts analyse new evidence that could prove the Beast of Bray Road is terrorised a Wisconsin town. Plus, is the human-wolf hybrid spreading across the US?

programme.title: Secrets Of The Underground
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 - Lost Pirate City Of Treasure'. When an infamous pirate city sunk into the sea, a huge treasure may have gone with it. Could cutting edge technology reveal its resting place?

programme.title: Fright Club
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Cat Caller'. Jack and the Ghost Brothers reveal what cats really do when they're home alone. Plus, comedian Jamie Kennedy shares a clip of real-life space invaders.

programme.title: The Ghost Town Terror
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - I Am The Darkness'. Tim and Sapphire use hypnosis to uncover secrets from the Broussard family's past. But a sinister spirit attachment hinders the experiment.

programme.title: Paranormal Lockdown UK
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Shepton Mallet Prison'. Nick and Katrina spend 72 hours confined in one of the UK's most notorious haunted hotspots - Shepton Mallet Prison. They investigate the spirits locked inside.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Nopeming Sanatorium'. The team face the horror of their childhood nightmares, Minnesota's most-notorious sanatorium. They must find a lot of courage to confront the terror inside.

programme.title: Haunting In The Heartland
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - I Am Red Death'. Steve heads to Greeneville, Tennessee, where a decades-long haunting resulted in tragedy. With the help of local law enforcement, he uncovers the town's dark past.
